raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a charge from XXXX, made back in XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX The company was fully operating at the time, and the return policy allowed for returns of items purchased. I requested a cancellation of my order and then a refund/return after receiving the items, but the company decided to shutter and changed their return policy to not take on any returns. I disputed the charge as 1 ) I didn't purchase any clearance items ( which has a no-return policy ) and 2 ) they changed the return policy after the fact. I sent Amex the supporting documentation showing this ( and the dialogue with the merchant, which never stated that my items were clearance items ) and they denied my dispute because the merchant is lying about the entire situation.
